tasks.subject: Task 1: Project scaffold
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Working Vite + React v19 + Tailwind v4 + Vitest project that renders "Garden Planner" and passes a smoke test.

**Files:**
- Create: `package.json`
- Create: `vite.config.js`
- Create: `index.html`
- Create: `src/main.jsx`
- Create: `src/App.jsx`
- Create: `src/index.css`
- Create: `src/test/setup.js`
- Create: `.gitignore`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `npm run dev` starts without errors
- [ ] `npm test` runs and passes the smoke test
- [ ] Page renders "Garden Planner" heading

**Verify:** `npm run test:run` → `1 passed`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["package.json", "vite.config.js", "index.html", "src/main.jsx", "src/App.jsx", "src/index.css", "src/test/setup.js", ".gitignore"], "verifyCommand": "npm run test:run", "acceptanceCriteria": ["npm run dev starts without errors", "npm test passes smoke test", "Page renders Garden Planner heading"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: PDF extraction script + plants.json
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Python pdfplumber script extracts plant data from both PDFs; developer manually reviews and commits `src/data/plants.json`.

**Files:**
- Create: `scripts/extract-plants.py`
- Create: `src/data/plants.json`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Script runs without errors
- [ ] plants.json has at least 5 plants with all required fields
- [ ] Each calendar array has exactly 12 booleans

**Verify:** `python -c "import json; data=json.load(open('src/data/plants.json')); assert all(len(p['calendar']['sow'])==12 for p in data); print(f'{len(data)} plants OK')"` → `N plants OK`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/extract-plants.py", "src/data/plants.json"], "verifyCommand": "python -c \"import json; data=json.load(open('src/data/plants.json')); assert all(len(p['calendar']['sow'])==12 for p in data); print(f'{len(data)} plants OK')\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Script runs without errors", "plants.json has 5+ plants", "Each calendar array has 12 booleans"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: URL state utilities
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `serializeState` and `deserializeState` functions with full TDD.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/utils/urlState.js`
- Create: `src/utils/urlState.test.js`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] serializeState produces correct URLSearchParams
- [ ] deserializeState recovers state from serialized string
- [ ] Invalid/missing params fall back to defaults
- [ ] Unknown plant names silently filtered

**Verify:** `npm run test:run -- urlState` → `8 passed`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/utils/urlState.js", "src/utils/urlState.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npm run test:run -- urlState", "acceptanceCriteria": ["serializeState produces correct URLSearchParams", "deserializeState recovers state", "Invalid params fall back to defaults", "Unknown plant names filtered"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Garden row layout calculation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `buildRows()` pure function with round-robin allocation and TDD.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/utils/gardenLayout.js`
- Create: `src/utils/gardenLayout.test.js`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Empty plant list returns no rows
- [ ] Single plant fills multiple rows until plot full
- [ ] Round-robin distributes across plants
- [ ] Plants that never fit go to overflowPlants
- [ ] plantCount minimum 1

**Verify:** `npm run test:run -- gardenLayout` → `7 passed`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/utils/gardenLayout.js", "src/utils/gardenLayout.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npm run test:run -- gardenLayout", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Empty plant list returns no rows", "Round-robin distributes rows", "Overflow plants tracked", "plantCount minimum 1"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: App shell with state and URL sync
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Full App.jsx with state, URL sync on every change, URL deserialization on mount.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/App.jsx`
- Modify: `src/App.test.jsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] State initializes from URL on mount
- [ ] Every state change updates window.location.search
- [ ] App.test.jsx passes

**Verify:** `npm run test:run -- App` → `2 passed`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/App.jsx", "src/App.test.jsx", "src/components/Sidebar.jsx", "src/components/GardenLayout.jsx", "src/components/GrowingCalendar.jsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run test:run -- App", "acceptanceCriteria": ["State initializes from URL", "State changes update URL", "Tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Sidebar component
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Full Sidebar.jsx with dimension inputs, light filter, plant checklist, cross-condition indicator, and Save button.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/components/Sidebar.jsx`
- Create: `src/components/Sidebar.test.jsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Width/length inputs update state
- [ ] Light filter toggles correctly
- [ ] Plant checklist filtered by lightFilter
- [ ] Cross-condition selections preserved
- [ ] "N selected in other conditions" shown when applicable
- [ ] Save button copies URL and shows Copied!

**Verify:** `npm run test:run -- Sidebar` → `8 passed`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/Sidebar.jsx", "src/components/Sidebar.test.jsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run test:run -- Sidebar", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Dimension inputs update state", "Light filter toggles", "Plant checklist filtered", "Cross-condition selections preserved", "Save button works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: GardenLayout component
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Scaled top-down garden grid with proportional row heights, colors, rulers, overflow notice.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/components/GardenLayout.jsx`
- Create: `src/components/GardenLayout.test.jsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Empty state when no plants
- [ ] Too-small message when no rows fit
- [ ] One div per row with plant name
- [ ] Overflow plants in doesn't-fit section
- [ ] Unused inches label shown
- [ ] Container has correct aspect-ratio

**Verify:** `npm run test:run -- GardenLayout` → `6 passed`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/GardenLayout.jsx", "src/components/GardenLayout.test.jsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run test:run -- GardenLayout", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Empty state shown", "Too-small message shown", "Rows render correctly", "Overflow plants listed", "Unused inches shown", "Correct aspect-ratio"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: GrowingCalendar component
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 12-month Sow/Grow/Harvest grid per plant with daysToHarvest label and legend.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/components/GrowingCalendar.jsx`
- Create: `src/components/GrowingCalendar.test.jsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Empty state when no plants
- [ ] Plant name on Sow row
- [ ] Sow/Grow/Harvest sub-rows present
- [ ] daysToHarvest on Harvest row
- [ ] 12 month headers rendered
- [ ] Legend shows all three phases

**Verify:** `npm run test:run -- GrowingCalendar` → `6 passed`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/GrowingCalendar.jsx", "src/components/GrowingCalendar.test.jsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run test:run -- GrowingCalendar", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Empty state shown", "Plant name on Sow row", "Sub-rows present", "daysToHarvest shown", "12 month headers", "Legend present"]}
```
